name: @forwardimpact/guide
description: Conversational agent that grounds career guidance and quality review in your organization's engineering standard.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.goal: Get Judgment Grounded in the Standard
jobs.trigger: The promotion conversation ended with 'not yet' but no specifics, and agent output gets reviewed line by line because nobody can tell whether it meets the bar.
jobs.bigHire: get career guidance and output review grounded in my organization's standard, not impressions or generic advice.
jobs.littleHire: ask a growth question or get a second opinion on a deliverable before approving it.
jobs.competesWith: annual reviews; mentor conversations; reviewing every line; trusting uncritically; hoping the next project makes readiness obvious

forces.push: Career conversations and agent review both run on subjective judgment with no shared evidence base.
forces.pull: A second opinion grounded in the standard, whether on a career or a deliverable.
forces.habit: Waiting for annual feedback and reviewing every line by hand.
forces.anxiety: Structured assessment might confirm being further behind than assumed.

jobs.firedWhen: assessments disconnect from promotion and approval decisions; or a reorg makes the standard feel irrelevant.
